signals.text: Monthly connect held Apr 14 -- first Pulkit-led call since Mar 10 handoff intro. Granola confirms meeting occurred.
Platform performance strong: 7d revenue $10,008 from 3,650 sessions with 2.03% CVR and 74 purchases. Perfect 20/20 platform score.
Preston is a self-sufficient power user: runs his own A/B tests, manages Meta ads, added AI Search links to site headers/footers, planning makeup line launch.
GM transition from Mia to Pulkit completed Mar 3. Still building relationship -- only 2 direct touchpoints so far (Mar 10 intro, Apr 14 monthly).
Zero Slack activity visible (no Slack MCP). No direct email from Pulkit to Preston found in last 30 days -- all emails are automated Meta approvals.
Preston's margins squeezed by tariffs and exchange rates. Running 10% vs 15% discount experiment but Meta pop-up contaminates the test. Price sensitivity risk.
Preston possibly relocating to NYC for wife's grad school (Jun 2026). Strong personal rapport with FERMAT team maintained.

performance.data_note: Metrics carried from Apr 13 refresh. FERMAT get_funnel_metrics API returned auth error on Apr 15. Period aggregates and daily array from prior API pull remain valid for the date ranges shown.

recent.title: Sole Toscana x Fermat
recent.participants: Mia DyBuncio, Preston (Sole Toscana), Sarah Herman
recent.summary: Mia DyBuncio announced her transition to the product team, necessitating account handover. She personally informed Preston about the change, expressed gratitude for their year-long working relationship, and committed to introducing him to his new growth manager (Pulkit) based in Bangalore via Slack.
action_items: Intro Preston to new account manager (Pulkit) over Slack

recent.title: Sole Toscana x Fermat
recent.participants: Mia DyBuncio, Preston (Sole Toscana), Sarah Herman
recent.summary: Preston is preparing for a March sale and running A/B tests on 10% vs 15% first-time order discounts, noting margins are tight due to tariffs and exchange rate. Meta pop-up issue causing customers in 10% funnel to still receive 15% off. AI search content feature just shipped. Preston asked about Shopify Agentic shopping channel.
action_items: Preston to test newly released AI search content feature
Mia to investigate Agentic shopping availability
Preston to turn off Meta pop-up during next ad optimization

calls.analysis: Glyphic shows 10 total calls with Sole Toscana. The most recent completed calls are the Mar 3 handoff goodbye (13 min) and Feb 17 check-in (21 min), both with previous GM Mia DyBuncio. Granola confirms a monthly connect occurred on Apr 14 (Pulkit-led) and the Mar 10 intro/handoff call. Preston is engaged and self-sufficient, running experiments and proactively adopting new features.

calendar.analysis: Google Calendar returned 0 events for 'Sole Toscana' in the Mar 16 - Jun 14 window. The Apr 14 monthly connect was found via Granola and Gmail (Zoom join notification) but not in calendar search -- likely titled differently or on a different calendar. Monthly cadence is established but no future events surfaced.
